vscode-systemd.commands.reportIssue: Report an issue with the systemd extension...
vscode-systemd.commands.plot: Plot a diagram detailing which system services have been started at what time.
vscode-systemd.config.units.system.label: Controls which system unit property is shown as the label in the Units explorer.
vscode-systemd.config.units.system.descr: Controls which system unit properties are shown as the description below the label in the Units explorer.
vscode-systemd.config.units.system.icon: Controls which system unit property determines the icon shown in the Units explorer.
vscode-systemd.config.units.system.group: Controls how system units are grouped in the Units explorer.
vscode-systemd.config.units.system.sortB: Controls how system units are sorted within each group in the Units explorer.
vscode-systemd.config.units.user.label: Controls which user unit property is shown as the label in the Units explorer.
vscode-systemd.config.units.user.descrip: Controls which user unit properties are shown as the description below the label in the Units explorer.
vscode-systemd.config.units.user.icon: Controls which user unit property determines the icon shown in the Units explorer.
vscode-systemd.config.units.user.groupBy: Controls how user units are grouped in the Units explorer.
vscode-systemd.config.units.user.sortBy: Controls how user units are sorted within each group in the Units explorer.
